title: potamogeton × fluitans var. billotii
intro: Potamogeton × fluitans var. billotii, also known as Water Clover, is a hybrid aquatic plant species that belongs to the family Potamogetonaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Water Clover include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies.
